data.summary_suggestion: Create a webhook subscription for document events
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new webhook subscription to receive event notifications for document lifecycle changes. Requires a valid webhook URL and event types to subscribe to. The subscription will be activated immediately and events matching the specified types will be sent to the provided URL. Returns the created WebhookSubscription object containing the subscription ID and configuration details. Webhooks will continue sending events until the subscription is deleted.
